_comment: ✅ VERIFIED 2026-06-26 — each image's on-image text was OCR-checked against its copy angle and all 6 pairings are correct (快狠准·1分钟 / TIMING·KEY SIGNAL / 只需1分钟·盖电脑 / 有本金不懂放大 / FD·复利 / 选择太多). Safe to rebuild PAUSED. content_id pins copy from Notion 'Image N' rows; SA needs READ on each file_id (or, if Drive is unavailable, reuse the image_hash already uploaded to the Meta account). Build: adbot build --manifest config/single_image_manifest_a.json --state-key entities_img_a --label 'Single-Image A' (reset state/entities_img_a.json first).

creatives.name: Image 14：只需 1 分钟 · 盖电脑
